Video.summary: Learn what the Dead Sea Scrolls are, the story of their unlikely discovery.
Video.title: The Discoveries and Their Significance

Image.alt: The Discoveries and Their Significance
The Discoveries and Their Significance
The Discoveries and Their Significance

Video.summary: Discover more about how scholars gained access to the first seven scrolls discovered at Qumran.
Video.title: The First Seven Scrolls

Image.alt: The First Seven Scrolls
The First Seven Scrolls
The First Seven Scrolls

Video.summary: Explore the scroll known as the Community Rule or Manual of Discipline.
Video.title: Opening and Reading the First Scroll

Image.alt: Opening and Reading the First Scroll
Opening and Reading the First Scroll

Video.summary: Consider history prior to the scrolls, beginning with the biblical period and moving forward.
Video.title: The Historical Backdrop of Ancient Judaism

Image.alt: The Historical Backdrop of Ancient Judaism
The Historical Backdrop of Ancient Judaism
The Historical Backdrop of Ancient Judaism

Video.summary: Gain insight into the appearance of Jewish sectarianism in late antiquity.
Video.title: The Rise of the Jewish Sects

Image.alt: The Rise of the Jewish Sects
The Rise of the Jewish Sects
The Rise of the Jewish Sects

Video.summary: Learn about different scholarly views of the historical Jesus.
Video.title: Jesus - The Man Who Became God

Image.alt: Jesus - The Man Who Became God
Jesus - The Man Who Became God
Jesus - The Man Who Became God

Video.summary: In the ancient world, there were many accounts of "divine" mortals. Explore ancient models of divine men.
Video.title: Greco-Roman Gods Who Became Human

Image.alt: Greco-Roman Gods Who Became Human
Greco-Roman Gods Who Became Human
Greco-Roman Gods Who Became Human

Video.summary: Delve further into the interface between the human and the divine in pagan cultures.
Video.title: Humans as Gods in the Greco-Roman World

Image.alt: Humans as Gods in the Greco-Roman World
Humans as Gods in the Greco-Roman World
Humans as Gods in the Greco-Roman World

Video.summary: In Genesis and Exodus, explore conceptions of divine beings that appear in human form.
Video.title: Gods Who Were Human in Ancient Judaism

Image.alt: Gods Who Were Human in Ancient Judaism
Gods Who Were Human in Ancient Judaism
Gods Who Were Human in Ancient Judaism

Video.summary: Learn about the divine figure of the Son of Man, and the Jewish conception of a "second God".
Video.title: Ancient Jews Who Were Gods

Image.alt: Ancient Jews Who Were Gods
Ancient Jews Who Were Gods
Ancient Jews Who Were Gods

Video.summary: Consider why the New Testament Gospels are the only useful early sources on the life of Jesus.
Video.title: The Life and Teachings of Jesus

Image.alt: The Life and Teachings of Jesus
The Life and Teachings of Jesus
The Life and Teachings of Jesus

Video.summary: In this episode, examine the biblical roots of Jewish history, belief, and practice.
Video.title: The Beginnings of Judaism-Biblical Roots

Image.alt: The Beginnings of Judaism-Biblical Roots
The Beginnings of Judaism-Biblical Roots
The Beginnings of Judaism-Biblical Roots

Video.summary: Here, encounter the historical contexts in which post-Biblical Judaism developed.
Video.title: New Challenges in the Late Biblical Period

Image.alt: New Challenges in the Late Biblical Period
New Challenges in the Late Biblical Period
New Challenges in the Late Biblical Period

Video.summary: In this episode, follow the rebuilding of Jewish communal life in their homeland.
Video.title: Jews under Persian Rule-The Return to Zion

Video.summary: Alexander the Great's incorporation of Palestine into the Hellenistic world challenged Jewish identity.
Video.title: The Challenge of Hellenism

The Challenge of Hellenism

Video.summary: The revolt of the Hasmoneans ultimately led to the establishment of an independent Jewish state.
